name: Tooltip
description: Passive contextual help surface for concise trigger hints, control explanations, unavailable-action context, and keyboard shortcuts.

props.name: type
props.description: Visual type: general information or validation/error message.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Arrow orientation relative to the tooltip body.

props.name: slotContent
props.description: Optional trailing content, such as a Kbd shortcut.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class name for the root tooltip.

states.rationale: Tooltip is a passive display surface. Type, orientation, and slot presence control visual output; trigger hover/focus/open behavior is owned by the consumer.

keyboard.Trigger focus: Show the tooltip from the associated trigger and reference it with aria-describedby
keyboard.Escape: May dismiss tooltip visibility when implemented by the trigger/positioning layer

accessibility.focusManagement: Tooltip root is not focusable; trigger owns focus and open/close behavior

propertyMapping.note: Figma calls this property intent. Code keeps the documented Tooltip type prop.
Figma text override maps to the required React text string.
Figma boolean controls slot visibility. Code uses slotContent presence.
Figma slot target maps to the React slotContent node. Recommended content includes Kbd, KbdGroup, small badges, icons, or compact metadata.
Figma-only arrow visibility toggle. Code always renders the decorative arrow.

useWhen: Explaining icons or controls without visible labels
Clarifying compact actions, statuses, or affordances
Showing a keyboard shortcut next to a short hint
Explaining why a control is unavailable
Providing helpful context that is not required to complete the task
doNotUseFor: Required form errors or recovery steps
Interactive content such as buttons, links, forms, or menus

knownDeviations.description: No L4 color component tokens exist in tokens.json for Tooltip. Code and Figma use semantic surface, border, text, danger, and shadow tokens directly; only --dls-radius-component-tooltip is component-scoped.
Figma exposes a pointer boolean. Code always renders the decorative arrow.
Figma separates slot visibility from the slot-content target. Code derives slot visibility from whether slotContent is provided.
Tooltip trigger behavior, positioning, visibility, and viewport collision are consumer responsibilities in code.
